title: Scroll Control
description: Advanced hotbar and tooltip scrolling controls with easy in-game configuration.
body:
# Mountain Toolkit: Scroll Control

**Scroll Control** is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod for **Minecraft 1.21.11** that makes scrolling feel more precise, flexible, and consistent across hotbar navigation and long item tooltips.

## Features

### Hotbar Navigation
- **Hotbar Left / Right Keybinds**
  - Scroll hotbar left by 1 slot
  - Scroll hotbar right by 1 slot

### Scrolling Options
- **Disable Scrolling** *(default: off)*
  - Disables hotbar scrolling behavior
- **Reverse Scroll Direction** *(default: off)*
  - Inverts scroll direction for hotbar actions
- **Prevent Overflow Scrolling** *(default: off)*
  - Prevents wrap-around between slot 1 and slot 9
- **CTRL Fast Scroll x4** *(default: off)*
  - Hold **CTRL** to scroll 4x faster when enabled

### Tooltip Controls
- **Scrollable Tooltips** *(default: on)*
  - Mouse wheel: scroll tooltip up/down
  - **Shift + mouse wheel**: scroll tooltip left/right
  - Activates when tooltip content is too large to fit on screen

## Compatibility
- **Mod Menu compatible** for easy in-game configuration
- **Client-side only** (no server installation required)
